entry.title: Re: Monitoring Apps on Kyma
entry.content:
Hi Sarbajeet,

You can leverage SAP Cloud Logging Service. Please refer to blogs for further information:

- https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/kyma-integration-with-sap-cloud-logging-part-1-introduction-and-shipping/ba-p/13648649

- https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/kyma-integration-with-sap-cloud-logging-part-2-let-s-ship-some-traces/ba-p/13674600

This is a managed service from SAP, which means less overhead on the customer side.

 

However, if you would prefer to use an open source tool, Kyma Open Telemetry supports integration with Prometheus stack too as well as with other open source tools that support open telemetry protocol. Please check this example for using the kube prometheus stack:
- https://github.com/kyma-project/examples/tree/main/prometheus 

Please note that in this case, the customer will be managing the Prometheus stack.

BR

Gaurav

entry.title: How to change Asset Depreciation frequency from monthly to Yearly in sap Public cloud
entry.content: How to change Asset Depreciation frequency from monthly to Yearly in sap Public cloud

entry.title: Re: Authentication for e2e Test Automation on BTP with SA...
entry.content:
To give everyone discovering this question a quick update.

In order to have a sign in with a gui to automate in wdi5 I set up a new authentication provider with https://auth0.com/

There is a tutorial setting up auth0 for social sign ins which I roughly followed https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/auth0-log-in-to-btp-with-your-social-accounts/ba-p/13518400

Now I am stuck at fine tuning the sign in to allow authentication via auth0 for Build and Workzone, but I guess this is more of a btp issue.

entry.title: SAP Build FTP Get File Collection Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm encountering an issue in SAP Build when attempting to retrieve a File Collection from SFTP (Port 22). Although the connection appears to be stable and the folder path is valid, when utilizing the Get File Collection for FTP function, it returns 0 lists and 0 elements, despite the presence of multiple files within the folder.

entry.title: Re: Is activation of US language a requirement/prerequisi...
entry.content:
Language selection is relevant for the end user UIs of the Identity Services as well as emails being sent and - if configured - terms-of-use and privacy documents.

see https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/supported-languages and https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/configure-default-language-for-end-user-screens for details which languages are supported and how default language is determined. 

One should setup those languages which are relevant for users being authenticated and registered in the Identity Services, but it is not mandatory - fallback/default language is always en-us.

entry.title: Re: How to get output channel of a billing output form in...
entry.content: Hey, I am also having an almost similar issue. Did you find any solution?

entry.title: Passing Internal Table / Deep Structure in Submit program
entry.content:
In the world of ABAP development, we often encounter the need to pass data between programs. Recently, I faced a requirement to transfer an internal table from one report program to another. After extensive research, I realized there wasn’t a straightforward method available online. Therefore, I devised a solution that involves converting the table data into JSON format and passing it as a string parameter to the called program, which then converts it back into a table. I believe this approach could be beneficial to others, and here’s how I implemented it:

In the Caller Program:

  1. Convert the Internal Table to JSON:

    DATA(lv_json) TYPE string.
lv_json = /ui2/cl_json=>serialize( data = lt_data ).

  2. Pass the JSON Data to the Called Program:

    SUBMIT z_submit WITH p_data = lv_json
  AND RETURN.

In the Called Program (z_submit):

  1. Create a Report with a String Parameter:

    REPORT z_submit.
PARAMETERS: p_data TYPE string.

  2. Define the Table Type: (Here, you would define the structure of your internal table/ Deep Structure that matches the JSON data structure.)

  3. Convert JSON Data (String Parameter) Back to Internal Table:

    DATA: lt_data TYPE <your_table_type>.
/ui2/cl_json=>deserialize(
  EXPORTING
    json = p_data
  CHANGING
    data = lt_data
).

This method is particularly useful when dealing with large datasets that need to be passed between programs without the use of global variables or database persistence. It’s a clean and efficient way to serialize and deserialize data.

I hope this technique proves to be useful. If you have any insights or know of a more straightforward method, please feel free to share your thoughts!

#abap

entry.title: Hi Whats does this mean Node: "Corporate-data-model" Error : Element name not defined in DTD
Question about sap fiori elements list report using odata v2 and odata v4
entry.content:
Hello experts, I have a question about building applications using the list report in SAP Fiori Elements with odata v2 and odata v4. When I create a project with odata v4, it does not create the CRUD structure automatically and neither the creation of the list nor the edit object page

 

So I decided to try with odata v2 and if the crud is created automatically but the page map stops working for some things like the creation of sections in the object header, the + does not appear to add one

The ones that are created are through annotations but I would like to use the page map the same as in odata v4 or, failing that, have odata v4 create the entire crud for me.

thanks for your help

Best regards,
Santiago Castano

entry.title: Re: Advanced Financial Closing in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

in your back end configuration for SAP Advanced Financial Closing we have got only task type "Fiori-Web Application". I works for both, Fiori and Gui Transaction Code. As soon as you do not want to use Fiori you need to copy the Business Transaction Type into Custom Namespace (Y* or Z*) and delete the information about Sematic Tag and Semantic Action as this is navigating into Fiori Launchpad. Type in the transaction code instead in column for transaction code. End user will open Gui for HTML instead of Fiori now.

Kind Regards,

Christian

entry.title: Re: How to query for bin location/warehouse history for i...

entry.title: Custom BP roles and Partner Role for Pricing
entry.content:
Hi,

My customer need to manage a custom field in the BP linked to the Sold-to, but from the moment that he has requested to manage the validity date, I've thought to manage it by relationship tab in which we identify the Payer linked to the Sold-to with the start and end validity date. The point is that we need to link the custom field to the pricing condition, so I've thought to create a BP custom role and a partner custom role in way that when I'll create the pricing condition, I will create for Sales Area and partner custom role created, but I am not sure that these steps enable to read the validity date on the relationship tab by the standard and it works.

Example: The custom field is called "category 1" with start validity date 01.01.2020 and end validity date 31.02.2021. From the date 01.03.2021 the sold-to change to "category 2", so I need to say at the system the following:

From the date 01.03.2021 give me the pricing condition for the "category 2" and not more "category 1". How I can do that? Any idea?

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
UweFetzer_se38

Hi Uwe, 

Very sorry to hear.

If this happens again, please let us know.

Best wishes,

Julie Plummer.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Create with dynamic Facets
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I saw at FioriConf that it is now possible to implement dynamic facets in create mode. This means that the facets change with a certain selection, for example through a dropdown in the first facet. Unfortunately, I can't find any documentation on this topic.

I currently have a case of a more complex transaction that was solved in SAPUI5 using the wizard. Maintaining the whole thing is of course very time-consuming and RAP and Fiori Elements are actually the way to go for us. The advantage of the wizard is of course that I can go many different ways depending on the selection. So the form is very dynamic.

Examples that are possible with the wizard:

A -> B -> B1 -> B2 -> C -> D

A -> B -> C -> D

A -> C -> D

Perhaps someone can show me an example of how I can implement dynamic facets in create mode. And how far can the whole thing be taken? Compared to the Wizard.

Best regards
Lars

The SAP Managed tag page the user linked to below, only displays a small snapshot of all content with any given tag. We recommend our users subscribe to our RSS feeds if they would like to be notified of all content for specific tags. We have more information here: https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/exploring-the-rss-feeds-of-the-new-sap-community-platform/ba-p/13594677

and here: https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/additional-sap-community-feeds/ba-p/13615436"

Best wishes,

Julie Plummer.

entry.content:

I tried to access the 'Demo' of the SAP Business One Mobile App, SAP Business One Sales App, and SAP Business One Service App, but was not able to access them and encountered errors. See the attached error messages for the respective apps. I have tested since last week but have never had a chance to be able to access it. Could it be that the that the SAP server for the mobile apps is down?

SAP Business One Mobile App error: Permission Denied. I'm accessing the SAP Demo system, it does not required any special setup, for the past I can access without issue, why now prompt error 'Permission Denied'?

SAP Business One Service App error: Log in failed. I'm accessing the SAP Demo system, it does not required any special setup, for the past I can access without issue, why now prompt error 'Log in failed'?

SAP Business One Sales App error: Log in failed. I'm accessing the SAP Demo system, it does not required any special setup, for the past I can access without issue, why now why prompt error 'Log in failed'?

entry.title: How to get output channel of a billing output form in S4HANA?
entry.content:
Hello,


Developed a custom driver program that calls a custom Adobe form, to generate the billing output form.
All the configurations are done in BRF+ and OPD and everything runs smoothly until there pop up the request to attach this document with the billing document.

In my driver program after I call the functions
FP_JOB_OPEN.
The function that generates the form
FP_JOB_CLOSE

I have implemented a perform called ATTACH_PDF.

but when in the BRF+ the billing output gets mapped for 2 channels
PRINT
EMAIL
the attach perform gets called twice since the driver program runs twice, once for each channel.

Is there any class/method/ FM that I can call so that I can get as a response the channel of this output, so I can put the ATTACH_PDF perform inside an IF statement and execute it only on the print channel???

Thanks in advance.

Himanshu Kawatra

SD Billing SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP for SAP Business Suite 
SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP  SAP Forms service by Adobe

---

FYI - it's good to know that when you delete the card from the Admin Console and recreate it via the Content Manager, you will not lose the assignments or configuration of the card! 😉

To upload DT 00 you need to use the Flexible Upload App (see attached) and use the template. 

Br.

Jan

entry.title: Direct filters with linked dimensions on date vs calendar week
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have two import models in the SAC with linked dimensions. One of the linked dimensions is the date. But in the story we have set the date-filter on calendar week and not the specific date in day granularity as we want to have a look at whole calendar weeks.

So what I am wondering now is: What does the SAC do in the background?

=> When I am filtering in the primary model on a certain calendar week with the calendar week filter in the story all data is being selected with a date within the selected calendar week. That is clear and easy to understand.

=> ...but how  does the direct filter via the linked dimension select on the secondary model and its date dimension in detail? Will the selction of the whole calendar week on the primary model be forwarded to the secondary model? Or will it just be the dates on day granularity found in the primary model that will be forwarded to the secondary model?

For example:
When I would select on calendar week 18 in 20024 and I only have data in there for Monday and Tuesday ( 2024/04/29 and 2024/04/30) but in the secondary model is data for each day of the week, will the secondary model just be filtered with 2024/04/29 and 2024/04/30 (and the data of 2024/05/01, ... 2024/05/05 will be missing) or will it be filtered with all days / dates of calendar week 18.2024?

Thanks a lot!
Martin

entry.title: Re: Maintain the conversion factor for the alternative unit KG in Bapi
entry.content: Hi, did you ever find the solution? I am having the same issues...

entry.title: SAP LMD/DSD - Last Mile Distribution
entry.content:
Following up to my last blog  SAP TM Integration with Last Mile Distribution - SAP Community will get in details in this blog I will focus on Route Execution.

There is different route type dependence how you setup your scenarios, for example, presales, delivery, or van sales. However, it is also possible to define route types for routes that combine the planning and execution of deliveries, van sales, and presales or merchandiser activities. For example, a delivery driver who typically delivers goods to customers might also occasionally capture sales orders and returns for the next delivery cycle.

You define a Route type with the build sequence.

After defining the Route follow the next path:

  • Map Source Types to Route Types
  • Map Source Statuses to Route Life Cycle Statuses
  • Map Route Categories to Route Types

More details can be check here: Route | SAP Help Portal

A Route exists 2 types with SAP LMD:

  • Paper-Based: All documents related to a route are printed out for the delivery driver. During route execution, the driver records all activities on paper. After a route is completed, the driver hands in all remaining documents and a settlement clerk checks all route information and records it by using the Settle Route Data app.
  • Mobile: All information related to a route is downloaded to the mobile device of the driver. During route execution, the driver records all activities on the mobile device. The driver uploads information about individual stops either during route execution or on completion of the route.

SAP LMD have a standard mobile solution which the Driver can use for the Last Mile Distribution.

SAP Direct Distribution - A New Mobile App for Dir... - SAP Community

3098683 - Last Mile Distribution Mobile Adapter: Mobile Application Configuration Handling - SAP for Me

Mobile Application SAP_LMD | SAP Help Portal

In this scenario will use the Standard Fiori App (Settle Route Data) to the Route Execution:

Once you open the Settle Route Data, can be filter with some parameters.

The Route ID in standard is the same number as the FO number from TM.

When we get inside in The Route, we can see the sequence of the process:

  • Check Out
  • Customer Documents
  • Check In
  • Payments
  • Differences
  • Log
  • Comments

In each of those Tab we can see the details of the Goods + Quantities the driver is moving for each customer and of the total are loading in the vehicle.

In the Check Out before the Driver leave the Warehouse the quantities can be adjusts in case is needed and following the Reason Code and Inventory Group.

In the next blog will follow with the Route Execution and Release for Settlement.

Refer:

Getting Started with Last Mile Distribution | SAP Help Portal

Route | SAP Help Portal

Execution of Delivery Routes | SAP Help Portal

Integration with Transportation Management | SAP Help Portal

SAP Direct Distribution | SAP Help Portal

3358604 - Last Mile Distribution - Release information/restriction note for OP2023 FPS0 - SAP for Me

Thanks and regards

Rogerio Lima.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Access Request Body in error handler for 40...
entry.content:
Hi @Arley , thank you, this works fine for entity served as projection of the ones in the data-model.cds.

In the scenario in which I am exposing an action with a custom defined type, the cds.context.http.req.data it is still undefined. Any suggestions?

 

define type EventMessage {
        ID       :      UUID;
        time     :      DateTime;
        name     :      String;
        category :      String;
        status   :      String;

    }
... 

action add @(restrict: [
        {
            grant: ['WRITE'],
            to   : 'admin'
        }])(
            ID   : EventMessage:ID,
            time : EventMessage:time,
            name : EventMessage:name,
            category : EventMessage:category,
            status : EventMessage:status
            ) returns String;

entry.title: Re: Passing Internal Table / Deep Structure in Submit program
entry.content:
That is a nice trick indeed. However I think that if you need to use it, the design of the report being submitted is flawed. 

Selection parameters are meant to be filled by end users and no end user is able to enter a JSON string manually. 

A simpler approach would be to use EXPORT TO MEMORY ID / IMPORT FROM MEMORY ID statements.

entry.title: Re: Production documents not imported - SFM
entry.content:
Hi,

Here you find a mapping list of Master Data Entities:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sustainability-footprint-management/application-help-for-corporate-and-products/master-data-entities

Production documents point to the AUFK (Order master data) table.

If you click on the line it should give you a more detailed error.

Cheers,
Dietmar

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Certification badge
entry.content:
Hi @Flo08 

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. In order to provide individual support please create a ticket in our User Support Center
To help the support team to understand your query better, could you please provide the following information in your correspondence?

  •            Detailed description of the issue
  •            Screenshots: To help us visualize the issue
  •            Please also provide the Course Code of course.

Kind regards,

Margit

entry.title: Different exchange rate in RFUMSV00
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we have to set a different exchange rate for RFUMVSA00/VAT Report. Journal entries are translated with exchange rate "M". But for the VAT report, the exchange rate given from the Bundesfinanzministerium (https://www.bundesfinanzministerium.de/Web/DE/Themen/Steuern/Steuerarten/Umsatzsteuer/Umsatzsteuer_Umrechnungskurse/umsatzsteuer_umrechnungskurse.html) should be used.

Is this possible in a public cloud system? And if yes, what SSCUI´s do I have to customize to get the desired report?

Best Regards and Thank you for any hints,

Sabrina

entry.title: Re: Sending ASN from Freight Order (embedded TM)
entry.content:
Hello thomaspasberg,

thanks a lot for your response. We don't use ASR. We don't see any advantage using this scenario.

My understanding is that we have to substitute the current shipment (LE-TRA) where we send the DESADV with a freight order in SAP-TM (embedded) sending the ASN-message. Furthermore, it should be possible to send it from a freight order and the consignment order is NOT mandatory. Please correct me, if I should be wrong.

We try to set-up the message with:

Is this correct?

Unfortunately, there is no "how-to" and/or specific guideline how to set-up the ASN. This would be very helpful for customers moving from LE-TRA to SAP-TM.

Regards,
Thorsten

entry.title: Approach to identify and remove duplicates from SAP ECC & CRM applications
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We would like to know if there is any tool or methodology which could identify and cleanup duplicate data in CRM and ERP application such as contacts, and customers. We have a client which is currently on SAP stack and want to accelerate the data cleanup process from CRM and ERP applications. If you have developed any programs, tools, or processes which can be used then we would love to leverage those instead of manual workaround.

Regards,

Deepak Rastogi

entry.title: Need clarification on systems for Snote implementation & Managed System configuration.
entry.content:
Hello SAP,
We have below concerns/queries:
1) Is Security S-notes implementation required in (SAP Cloud Connector) and (SAP Convergent Mediation) systems? If yes, please let us know how to implement S-notes.
2) Is it possible to do "Managed Systems Configuration" for these 2 systems in production solman system?
Could you please clarify on these two concerns/queries.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need clarification on systems for Snote implementatio...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding your concerns, 
1. Security notes implementations are required in various SAP systems, so it should be the same for your systems. 
Please refer to How to Implement SAP note in SNOTE - SAP Community for implementing SAP note in SNOTE. Should you have other concerns regarding note implementation, please contact component BC-UPG-NA for further support.
2. It is possible to do managed system configuration for these systems in solution manager.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Certification: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementat...
entry.content: 🙂

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report / PrintOutputController.ModifyPrinterN...
entry.content:
Hello Gottfried,

we experience this problem with different printer manufacturers (e.g. Sharp, UTAX and Kyocera also). Sharp told us to use an universal driver. 😠
We found that this problem only occurs when printing to a problematic printer that is not the default printer. It is not a solution, but perhaps a viable workaround, to make it the default printer.

Regards
HML

entry.title: 1H2024 REST API reviewRouteMaps for Performance Management
entry.content:
I have a question regarding the use of the API in conjunction with the activated manager transfer for forms that are being processed.

Can the API also be used to remove a user ID from a single-step, EMM role in a form so that the step is omitted?
Is the change always retained statically in the form?
Or is this change corrected again by the active manager transfer when a manager change is made, thereby adding the step again?

Many thanks for your feedback

entry.title: Re: GUI_DOWNLOAD unknown_dp_error
entry.content:
REPORT csv.

* Reading data from Microsoft CSV *


PARAMETERS: p_fname    TYPE string OBLIGATORY,
            tb_name    TYPE tabname16 OBLIGATORY,
            date_f(10) TYPE c MODIF ID abc DEFAULT 'MM/DD/YYYY', "date format
            deli(1)    TYPE c MODIF ID abc DEFAULT ';', "delimiter
            dec_f      TYPE string MODIF ID abc DEFAULT '1,234,567.89', "decimal format
            w_h_line   AS CHECKBOX MODIF ID abc DEFAULT 'X'. "with_header_line

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
  LOOP AT SCREEN.
    IF screen-group1 = 'ABC'.
      screen-input = 0.
    ENDIF.
    MODIFY SCREEN.
  ENDLOOP.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST FOR p_fname.
  PERFORM file_open_dialog CHANGING p_fname.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  DATA: lf_line TYPE string.

  DATA: lt_config       TYPE mmpur_mgrp2pgrp_t,
        gt_itab         TYPE truxs_t_text_data,
        ls_file_line    LIKE LINE OF  gt_itab,
        lv_filename     TYPE string,
        lv_filename_usr TYPE localfile,
        l_table_count   TYPE i,
        data_ref        TYPE REF TO data.


  DATA : d_entry        TYPE REF TO data.
  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <t_entry> TYPE table,
    <line>    TYPE any.

  CREATE DATA d_entry TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF (tb_name).
  ASSIGN  d_entry->* TO <t_entry>.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
  <line2> TYPE any .

  CREATE DATA data_ref TYPE (tb_name).
  ASSIGN data_ref->* TO <line2>.

  DATA:tb_data     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF str_table,
       gt_split    TYPE TABLE OF string,
       gt_variable TYPE TABLE OF string,
       tb_header   TYPE TABLE OF string,
       it_data     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  data_ref,
       count       TYPE i,
       index       TYPE i VALUE 1,
       header      TYPE string,
       value       TYPE string.

  DATA : variable     TYPE string,
         in_month     TYPE string,
         in_day       TYPE string,
         out_month(2),
         out_day(2).

  DATA : variable_tmp   LIKE variable,
         TYPE_of_value  LIKE dd01v-datatype,
         is_decimal(1)  TYPE c,
         is_negative(1) TYPE c.


  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_UPLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_fname
      filetype                = 'ASC'
      has_field_separator     = deli
      read_by_line            = 'X'
    TABLES
      data_tab                = gt_itab
    EXCEPTIONS
      file_open_error         = 1
      file_read_error         = 2
      no_batch                = 3
      gui_refuse_filetransfer = 4
      invalid_type            = 5
      no_authority            = 6
      unknown_error           = 7
      bad_data_format         = 8
      header_not_allowed      = 9
      separator_not_allowed   = 10
      header_too_long         = 11
      unknown_dp_error        = 12
      access_denied           = 13
      dp_out_of_memory        = 14
      disk_full               = 15
      dp_timeout              = 16
      OTHERS                  = 17.
  IF sy-subrc NE 0.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

  IF lines( gt_itab ) = 0 .
    WRITE / ` Excel file is empty!`.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.




  LOOP AT gt_itab INTO ls_file_line.

    lf_line  = ls_file_line.

*   split record into fields
    IF sy-tabix = 1.
      SPLIT ls_file_line AT deli INTO TABLE tb_header.
      DESCRIBE TABLE  tb_header LINES count.
    ELSE.

      "SPLIT ls_file_line AT deli INTO TABLE gt_split.
      CALL FUNCTION 'RSDS_CONVERT_CSV'
        EXPORTING
          i_data_sep       = deli
          i_esc_char       = '"'
          i_record         = lf_line
          i_field_count    = 9999
        IMPORTING
          e_t_data         = gt_split
        EXCEPTIONS
          escape_no_close  = 1
          escape_improper  = 2
          conversion_error = 3
          OTHERS           = 4.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        MESSAGE 'Error importing file' TYPE 'E'.
      ENDIF.

      index = 1.
      WHILE index <= count.
        READ TABLE gt_split INDEX index TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.
          header = tb_header[ index ].
          CONDENSE header.
          value  = gt_split[ index ].
          CONDENSE value.
          IF value IS NOT INITIAL.
            TRY.

                variable = CONV string( value ).

                " check date format MM/DD/YYYY and conv it
                FIND REGEX '^\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4}$' IN variable .
                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  SPLIT variable AT '/' INTO TABLE gt_variable.
                  in_day   = gt_variable[ 1 ].
                  in_month = gt_variable[ 2 ].
                  out_month =  |{ in_month ALPHA = IN }|.
                  out_day =  |{ in_day ALPHA = IN }|.
                  DATA(date_formated) = |{ gt_variable[ 3 ] }|  & |{  out_day }|  & |{  out_month }|.
                  value = CONV date( date_formated ).
                ENDIF.
                " check date format MM/DD/YYYY and conv it

                "check value if is number
                CLEAR : variable_tmp , TYPE_of_value , is_decimal.

                variable_tmp =  variable .
                REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING ',' IN variable_tmp WITH space.
                REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING '.' IN variable_tmp WITH space.

                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  is_decimal = 'X'.
                ENDIF.

                REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING '-' IN variable_tmp WITH space.

                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  is_negative = 'X'.
                ENDIF.

                CALL FUNCTION 'NUMERIC_CHECK'
                  EXPORTING
                    string_in  = variable_tmp
                  IMPORTING
                    string_out = variable_tmp
                    htype      = TYPE_of_value.

                IF TYPE_of_value = 'NUMC'.
                  IF is_decimal = 'X'.

                    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING ',' IN value WITH space.
                    IF is_negative <> 'X'.
                      REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING '.' IN value WITH ','.
                    ENDIF.
                  ELSE.
                    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING ',' IN value WITH space.
                  ENDIF.
                ENDIF.
                "check value if is number

                <line2>-(header) = value.

                IF <line2>-(header) <> value.
                  WRITE / ` ERROR : line` && ` => ` && index && ` column` && ` => ` && header.
                  WRITE / ` Error during registration of characteristic ` && value && ` to data element `  &&  <line2>-(header) .
                  RETURN.
                ENDIF.
              CATCH cx_root.
                WRITE / ` ERROR : line` && ` => ` && index && ` column` && ` => ` && header.
                WRITE / ` ERROR : Incompatible data element`.
                RETURN.
            ENDTRY.
          ENDIF.

        ENDIF.
        index = index + 1.
      ENDWHILE.

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <t_entry> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<line1>).
      <line1>  =  CORRESPONDING #( <line2>  ).
      CLEAR : <line2>.

    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT <t_entry> ASSIGNING <line>.
    INSERT (tb_name) FROM <line>.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      l_table_count = l_table_count + 1 .
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  COMMIT WORK AND WAIT.

  WRITE / ' Query OK, ' && l_table_count && ' rows affected' .


FORM file_open_dialog CHANGING cp_fname.

  DATA: lt_filetable TYPE filetable,
        lv_rc        TYPE i.

  cl_gui_frontend_services=>file_open_dialog(
    EXPORTING
      default_extension       = 'csv'
      file_filter             = '(*.csv)|*.csv|'
      multiselection          =  abap_false
    CHANGING
      file_table              = lt_filetable
      rc                      = lv_rc
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS                  = 1 ).

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
  ENDIF.

  TRY.
      cp_fname = lt_filetable[ 1 ]-filename.
    CATCH cx_root.
  ENDTRY.

ENDFORM.
"Reading data from Microsoft CSV *

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm SEBRI HOUSSEM, an industrial engineering graduate. Currently, I'm diving into the world of SAP for PP and QM modules. I'm actively seeking opportunities to enhance my digital skills to keep up with all the innovations in the SAP ecosystem. Passionate about learning and development, I firmly believe SAP offers a variety of learning paths and certifications to further my professional growth. I'm eager to be part of this initiative and make an impact on learning for many organizations.

There's the content !

Thanks !

entry.title: How to transform a date into calendar week in SAC within the model data in wrangling
entry.content:
Hello SAC-Community,

I am thinking of how to be able to join two import data sources into one SAC model. One of the join criterias would be the calendar week.

So I would import the data with dates from the first data source (SQL database) and then add data from a BW on HANA, where I already have a field with calendar week and year.

Therefore I would have to tranform the date from the imported SQL-data into the calendar week. But how can I achieve this? I did not find a function for this in the SAC wrangling environment. Has there anybody an idea?

(...and the calendar week that is in the date dimension for filtering does not seem to be available for joining two data sources in the data warangling environment)

Thanks a lot and best regards,
Martin

entry.title: SAP Business One Web Client Order-to-Cash Pre-sales - Demo _ 2024 Partner Summit
entry.content:
Step-by-step Video: OrderToCash2402_V1.mp4

Summarised Highlights for Marketing Documents:

Until 2402:

•Long Text  (opening and Closing Text)
•Support “Text” and “Subtotal” line types
•Linked list Views


Outlook to 2405:
- Sales Quotation; Alternative Items
- Marketing Documents: Rich Text editor (opening and Closing Text)
- Marketing Documents: Reference documents 
- Marketing Documents: Copy to/from

More SAP Business One Web Client Product Updates: 

 

https://help.sap.com/doc/1e149715909a4d8ea8920df5513eb64c/10.0/en-US/SAP_Business_One_10.0_Highlights.pdf

entry.title: Re: Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case
entry.content:
Hello, 
In which release are you looking for the data source?
Please note that the feature is only available as of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 and is not yet available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.
Best regards
Angelika

entry.title: Navigating the Energy Transition: Transforming the S.MART Shop from an Energy Consumer to Prosumer.
entry.content:
Navigating the Energy Transition: From Energy Consumer to Prosumer at SAP Experience Centre in Walldorf.

In the heart of SAP Walldorf Campus, where innovation thrives and technology sets the stage for the future, there's a place where cutting-edge technology meets the pressing challenges of our time—the SAP Experience Centre. Here, with the S.MART Energy Shop showcase, customers and partners embark in firsthand on a transformation journey that navigates the intersection of Distributed Energy Resources (DERs), the rise of the prosumer, and the power of digital innovation.

In this blog post, you will know more about the project to transform the S.MART Shop in the SAP Walldorf Experience Centre from an Energy Consumer to an Energy.

 

Embracing the Distributed Energy Future

The energy landscape is undergoing a profound transformation, driven by the proliferation of DERs—solar panels, wind turbines, battery storage, and electric vehicles. This transformation process has a major impact reshaping how we generate, distribute, and consume electricity. Also is affecting the Utilities business model: affect how they manage the assets, how the utilities interact with customers and what customers expect from the utilities.

At the SAP Experience Centre, visitors delve into the world of DERs, discovering how these assets are empowering individuals, businesses, and communities to take control of their energy destiny into a more decentralized, digitalized, and sustainable energy system.

 

The Rise of the Prosumer

The Energy Transition is a reality. Prosumers are growing in the energy space as more customers generate their own electricity from distributed energy resources. Gone are the days when electricity consumption was a one-way street. Today’s electric grid is blurring the lines between power generation and consumption.

At the S.MART Shop showcase, visitors witness in firsthand how individuals and organizations can apply DERs, smart meters, and digital platforms to become active participants in the energy ecosystem, guided by the experience of their Utilities companies.

 

Navigating the Transformation Journey

Transitioning from a passive energy consumer to an active prosumer comes with challenges. At the showcase, visitors gain insights into the transformation journey, from understanding energy consumption patterns and evaluating DER options to navigating financial considerations. Through expert-led workshops and interactive simulations, visitors discover how SAP and Partner solutions can help simplify the transition process, giving prosumers with the tools and insights they need to succeed in the new energy landscape.

 

 

CONCLUSION: Shaping the Future of Energy Together

The journey from energy consumers to advance prosumers isn't just a vision of the future—it's a reality. At the SAP Experience Centre customers have the chance to explore this transformative journey, from the potential of distributed energy resources to the empowerment of prosumers through digital innovation. Whether you're a utility executive navigating the complexities of the energy transition or a business looking to take control of your energy future, the showcase shares a light into the possibilities that lie ahead. Together, we can shape a more sustainable, resilient, and efficient energy future—one where everyone has the power to become a prosumer and contribute to a brighter tomorrow.

 

If you want to request a tour please visit the SAP Experience Center website or get in contact with your SAP Representative.

entry.title: How to set "CopyToTargetDoc" in Attachments to No when "CopyAttachmentsFromBaseToTarget" equals Yes?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to attach a file to a marketing document but it should not be copied to target documents.

In the UI you can uncheck the checkbox when the setting at company level is checked, but using the value tNO via Service Layer or DI API does not seem to work, neither in attachment creation or in an update operation.

However, when the company setting is set to No, you can set CopyToTargetDoc to Yes as expected.

Here you have a sample payload for Attachments2 endpoint. CopyToTargetDoc is stored as tYES.


{
    "Attachments2_Lines": [
        {
            "FileExtension": "txt",
            "FileName": "Prueba_adjunto",
            "SourcePath": "C:\\Users\\jdelviso\\Desktop",
            "CopyToTargetDoc": "tNO"
        }
    ]
}
 
System info:
 
SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.180) FP 2111 (64-bit)

entry.title: Re: Sending ASN from Freight Order (embedded TM)
entry.content:
If ASR is not used, the delivery goods movement status is not propagated to the Freight Order. This status is checked in the standard PPF-action TOR_TPNOR_ASN for sending the ASN. Thus, in your scenario it will not work by just re-using the standard actions.

To send the ASN-message based on your process, you can use a custom PPF-action which is triggered as soon as required. To do so, you can check the PPF-guide Output Management Configuration Guide (sap.com) and the TM-enhancement guide Hands on Guide TMS (sap.com) In your custom-action you can trigger the TORGenericRequest_Out message similar to the standard coding. As a reference, you can check the method call exec_tor_tpnord_fu_asn for Consignment Orders in the SAP standard PPF-class /SCMTMS/CL_PPF_SERV_TOR_B2B and method METHOD_CALL_BY_ABAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarifica...
entry.content:
Hello @Brinda911 ,

Please make sure you check the data flow overview so you see the chronology of objects needed to be created and replicated. Then please go through the set up document and make sure that you have the configurations done correctly in SB, CPI, Event Mesh and S/4HanaCloud systems. I think this should help you to get an overview how the data flows between the systems. Links can be found below.

Data Flow Overview:

https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/integration/data-flow-overview 

Setup:

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/57Z_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf 

Best regards,

Shpresim Shabaj

entry.title: Implement T-code：ABUMN appear message AA318
entry.content:
Hi All,

I use ABUMN to transfer asset in 2024.04, but appear message AA318.

I found the original invoice posting date is in 2024.05, so I reversed the invoice then repost in 2024.04, but the message AA318 still exist.

Via debug, I found the date checking logic in the picture, The data retrieved by method still contains the reversed invoice items.

I guess the data take from table ANEK, the reversed invoice posting date it in 2024.05, According to the logic in the picture, there is any posting date from ANEK greater than the posting date I specified in ABUMN, the message AA318 will appear.

Is there any way for me to transfer assets in 2024.04?

If the expression is not clear, please tell me by replying. Thanks All!

entry.title: Re: Passing Internal Table / Deep Structure in Submit program
entry.content:
This trick is not needed anymore, you can pass any kind of data object (*) if you indicate "NO-DISPLAY".

Example:

 

REPORT.
PARAMETERS itab TYPE string_table NO-DISPLAY.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  IF itab IS INITIAL.
    itab = VALUE #( ( `Hello world` ) ).
    SUBMIT zzsro_pass_any_itab_via_submit WITH itab = itab AND RETURN.
  ELSE.
    WRITE itab[ 1 ].
  ENDIF.

 

(*) To be precise (ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com)😞

"If the addition NO-DISPLAY is specified, a selection parameter can have any data types except for reference types. These selection parameters can only be filled using the WITH addition of the SUBMIT statement. In this case, unlike the general conversion rule for deep types, the same rules apply as when importing data from a data cluster."

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: \nread ECONNRESET in CAP OData Service
entry.content:
Exporting the following environment variable would display more detailed logs for remote services:

export SAP_CLOUD_SDK_LOG_LEVEL=silly

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: \nread ECONNRESET in CAP OData Service
entry.content:
For Cloud Foundry, use the following command to set the environment variable for your application:

cf set-env <your_app> SAP_CLOUD_SDK_LOG_LEVEL silly

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: \nread ECONNRESET in CAP OData Service
entry.content: kubectl set env deployment <your_deployment_name> SAP_CLOUD_SDK_LOG_LEVEL=silly

entry.title: Batch Characteristics value transfer for movement type 309

Dear Experts,

I am executing a mat to mat movt type 309 for a batch managed material where the batch characteristics values are not getting copied over to the new batch. 

How can this be enabled? Pls share any solution approaches. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Query related learning hub course:'Acquiring Core ABA...
entry.content: Could you explain how the answer below helped? I mean "accepted solution"

entry.title: Performance Process - Suggestions
entry.content:
Hello,

we are currently re-thinking our performance process to make it more easier.

Currently we have the following in place:

1. Performance Objectives from January - December

2. Performance Review in October (inlcuding objectives review)

3. On demand individual performance form (IDP) set up as a regular performance form including development objectives.

We would like to shorten this process so that the performance review is only for the objectives and then have a separate process for development.

How do you manage the development process? We are thinking to have a mid-year performance form for development but probably continous performance would be better.

Let me know your thoughts.

Kind regards,

Simon

entry.title: Issue in custom purchase requisition app after SAPUI5 version upgrade
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

We have recently upgraded the SAPUI5 version to 1.71.64 as suggested by SAP post SP upgrade as we were having issues with few finance Fiori apps.

 

After the upgrade, finance apps errors were resolved. However, now we are facing one issue in custom app where unwanted field is appearing on the screen. If this is not fixed, then business processes will be affected.

 

Can you please let me know if there are any KBAs for any changes to be done in custom apps post SAPUI5 version upgrade.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Krutika Rani

entry.title: SAP MII How insert data to MDO throught illuminator
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying pass arguments to my MDO throught illuminator. I create link like this:
http://<server>:<port>/XMII/Illuminator?server=MDOConnector&Mode=Insert&MDO=Project%2FMIIOBJ%2FMDOTest&Col1=Value1&Col2=Value2.

When I execute this link I recieve message in my browser that "Command Query Successful". After this when I check MDO in workbench I can see that It looks like this:

Why I can't see my values? Do I need to change anything in permissions?

Is there any different option to dynamically push data to MDO?

entry.title: Re: Service Consumption Model 2 for OData Client Proxy
entry.content:
hi @bernhard_grusie ,

in the below tutorial to Call an external API SAP BTP ABAP Environment and parse the response using JSON or XML there is no usage of service consumption model..could you please let us know in what scenarios SVC is optional.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-external-api.html

Kris

entry.title: Show Changeset error response from SAP RAP in UI
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am creating a mass upload Fiori app using SAP RAP in the backend. I would be passing multiple requests as part of batch and then validate those requests in the backend. I am returning error messages for the failed records and I want to highlight the entries which have errors but the problem is in UI, the error response fails with error 400 and I just see one error for whole batch. The error response has the error messages from the backend but there is no way I can link the errors to the requests.

Any pointers will be appreciated.

thanks

entry.title: How to remove spacing and underline between label and value at selection-screen of subscreen?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to remove spacing and underline between label and value at selection-screen of subscreen?

 

SELECTION-SCREEN : BEGIN OF SCREEN 247 as SUBSCREEN.
  PARAMETERS :      werks    type ekpo-werks,
                    matnr     type matnr,
                    lgort      type EKPO-LGORT.
  SELECT-OPTIONS : so_data for budat.
SELECTION-SCREEN : END OF SCREEN 247.

 

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  MODULE STATUS_0240.
  call SUBSCREEN sub
  INCLUDING sy-repid '0247'.
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  call SUBSCREEN sub.
  MODULE USER_COMMAND_0240.

entry.title: How to Auto fill Planning Columns in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

I am working on FTE planning and the Planning is done Month wise . My measure is FTE .

I have been asked to auto fill the FTE coming from HR Master Data for each employee into these forecasted months by default .

Example if employee 1 FTE is 0.5 then copy this value to Forecast from JAN-DEC planning columns.

Please Help .

 

Thanks,

Zeba

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Replication Flow - Started failing w...
entry.content:
Hello,

Apply latest notes from Note Analyzer (program CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI) in your S/4 system.

That fixed the partition error for us.

Best regards

entry.title: Joule free message limits
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if the annual message limits for Joule (for ex. for small clients 240.000 messages) are applicable for all instances together? Or is the limit valid for each instance, so clients could use 240.000 in the test system and additional 240.000 messages in the productive system?

Best regards

Julia

entry.title: SuccessFactors ONB Custom Task JSON Codat sample
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have configured the ONB Custom Task in SAP SUccessFactors Onboarding module. But out customer wants to enable few instructions fields like Message String only if certain field are seleted.

We are trying to write a JSON code to populate if Hiring manager has selected Yes for Is Laptop and Charger then instructions message to be populated Below is the sample JSON Code but it is not working.

{
"type": "Rich Text",
"Condition": {
"scope": "#/properties/x-laptopCharger",
"schema": {
"expectedValue": "Yes"
}
}
}

@Gopinath : Any help

entry.title: Re: SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain – 2405
entry.content: Any enhancements or updates to Order Based Planning?

entry.title: Re: "Mobile Services Cockpit - Trial" version warning "Mi...
entry.content: Looking at the screenshot https://community.sap.com/t5/image/serverpage/image-id/105655i704B0F420DA4ABFF/image-size/large?v=v2&px=999, there is currently no application (it shows 0 started, 0 stopped apps) in your space. In general, you would see BindMobileApplicationRoutesToME listed under applications in the space cockpit when creating a BTP trial account. In your case, It didn't happen due to some reasons. I will forward this thread to our experts from mobile services to share what can be done here.

entry.title: Excluding inspection step in Advanced returns management.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can you some one help with possibilities of taking Quality notification/ inspection steps from advanced returns management? We do not have Quality view maintained in Material Master.

Currently, our business does not have quality in-scope and when we create Subsequent free of charge order in returns overview, process status shows as incomplete without inspection steps of (MSR_INSPWH)

 

Thank you
Satwik Joshi

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
@PeterGutsche  - Thanks for reply. 

A workaround to bypass this situation would be to associate the API client with a user defined by an identity provider. - Could you please elaborate more on associating API client with user? 

We are looking to enable feature where Service keys will be used within CI/CD pipeline and expecting that service key associated with particular package (and its owner) will be able to deploy/change iflows and restrictions will be applied via Access Policy etc.

entry.title: Re: Batch Characteristics value transfer for movement type 309
entry.content: I have already made the required settings for movement type 309 by selecting 4 in batch classification and copy chars as Characteristics from classification (priority) and configuration

entry.title: Need to configure reverse pricing
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a scenario in which I enter amount in PR00 inclusive of tax for ex if the price is Rs100 and tax is 18%  then my total value will be Rs100 + Rs18(18% of 100) = Rs118, I will enter Rs118 in PR00. I want to get Rs100 in net value and Rs18 in total tax calculation.

I have tried a copying pricing procedure RVAB01, and tried to insert JOIG condition within it, but the JOIG is calculating the wrong tax value. It is calculating Rs19.62 in JOIG. It is calculating correct value in MWSI which is Rs18.

Please suggest me how to implement the scenario on priority.

entry.title: Re: Batch Characteristics value transfer for movement typ...
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked the settings under   “Activate Batch Classification for Goods Movements in IM” – OMCV, whether the batch classification is maintained for the movement type 309?. If not you can set the classification option to 4 in a test system and recheck. You can research more on other options available.

entry.title: Input Control Changing Font Size
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need change the font size in input control member selection.

I try to CSS for this case. It works for Header Title and Subtitle but not work in selection. Is there a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: How to remove spacing and underline between label and value at selection-screen of subscreen?
entry.content: You can customize it a little bit only by using SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN/END OF LINE, although I don't see a good reason to just "remove spacing and underline".

entry.title: Re: How to complete Physical inventory doc if I not do MI07
entry.content:
Hi 

Go to MI02 and put deletion for indicator . It will be closed 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan
